tier1.label: Quick Cash — Freelance/Contract
tier1.template: Hey {{name}}, saw your post about {{topic}}. My partner and I run a small dev + digital marketing studio — we specifically work with founders and small teams who need things built fast without enterprise agency pricing. Happy to chat if you're still exploring options.

tier2.label: Product Build — Project-Based
tier2.template: Hey {{name}}, saw your post about {{topic}}. We're a two-person engineering team that helps founders and small companies go from idea to shipped product — MVPs, web apps, mobile apps, the works. We move fast and keep costs reasonable. If you're still looking for help, happy to jump on a quick call.

tier3.label: AI Founder Scale-Up — Premium
tier3.template: Hey {{name}}, saw your post about {{topic}}. My partner and I are engineers who specifically work with non-technical founders hitting that scaling wall — moving off no-code, building proper infra, cleaning up architecture so it doesn't break at 10x users. Happy to jump on a quick call if you want to talk through what you're dealing with.

tier4.label: Branding & Packaging
tier4.template: Hey {{name}}, saw your post about {{topic}}. My partner and I run a design studio that helps product companies with branding and packaging — brand identity, packaging design, visual systems, the works. We work with founders and small teams who want standout design without big agency pricing. Happy to chat if you're still exploring options.

instructions: Use these templates as a starting point but personalize each message based on the specific post content, the lead's company, and their apparent pain point. Keep messages to 3-4 sentences max. End with a soft CTA.
